description.zh: 从陌生领域快速建立关键词、核心文献、引用网络、研究缺口和追踪清单。
description.en: Build keywords, core papers, citation maps, research gaps, and tracking lists for an unfamiliar field.

description.zh: 把论文列表和 PDF 转成证据矩阵、方法比较、引用核验和综述图表。
description.en: Turn paper lists and PDFs into evidence matrices, method comparisons, citation checks, and review figures.

description.zh: 投稿前检查摘要、图组叙事、审稿风险和引用支撑。
description.en: Check abstract clarity, figure narrative, review risk, and citation support before submission.

description.zh: 生成期刊级单图、多面板图、视觉质检和论文图组叙事。
description.en: Create journal-grade single plots, multi-panel figures, visual QA, and figure-story structure.

description.zh: 覆盖蛋白结构预测、序列设计、单细胞分析、基因组模型和远程计算。
description.en: Cover protein structure prediction, sequence design, single-cell analysis, genomic models, and remote compute.

description.zh: 把远程主机、云 GPU、模型端点和推理调用整理成可复用科研执行环境。
description.en: Turn remote hosts, cloud GPUs, model endpoints, and inference calls into reusable research execution environments.

description.zh: 把重复科研流程沉淀为自定义技能、agent profile、评测样例和复盘机制。
description.en: Turn repeated lab workflows into custom skills, agent profiles, eval cases, and audit loops.
